top_signals.title: Apache going down near Oman a sign of air combat evolution, analysts warn
top_signals.summary: Experts say the U.S. Army Apache that went down near Oman offers a snapshot into how air assets must now contend with cheaper, rapidly evolving drones.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Waymo recalls about 3,900 robotaxis after some drove into 'freeway construction zones'
top_signals.summary: After some Waymo robotaxis drove into closed construction zones, the company implemented a recall to fix underlying software issues.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Celsius’ Mashinsky gets permanent trading ban in CFTC settlement
top_signals.summary: The US commodities watchdog has settled with Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky, ending the agency’s first-ever case against a crypto lending platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
